steps.title: Link gardens to clam gains
steps.content: The songs describe terraced gardens used by Kwakwaka'wakw people to cultivate clams. Archaeological evidence shows increases in clam size and abundance when that method was used, supporting the idea that the practice improved the food source.

steps.title: Reject unsupported claims
steps.content: Choice A invents adoption by non-Indigenous people. Choice C compares the archaeological record across song traditions without evidence. Choice D makes claims about current practices that the passage never gives. The answer is B.
